info.description: Central API for global administration, cross-store reporting, integrations, and Store Edge synchronization.
info.title: Mercadia Central Backend

get.summary: Get service health
Get service readiness

get.description: Query parameters `since` and `until` must be RFC3339 timestamps (inclusive window). Optional `region` filters registered stores. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List per-store reporting summaries for a time window

get.description: Query parameters `since` and `until` must be RFC3339 timestamps (inclusive window). Optional `region` filters registered stores. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get cross-store reporting summary for a time window

get.description: Returns region status and registered store count. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get central backend status

get.description: Returns central admin users. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: List central users

post.description: Creates a central admin user. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

get.description: Returns a central admin user. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get central user

patch.description: Updates central user roles, password, or active state. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

get.description: Lists stores registered in the central registry. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: List registered stores

post.description: Registers a store in the central registry. Requires `X-Sync-Api-Key` when configured, otherwise `X-Session-Token` with `users.manage`.

parameters.description: Unique key used to make command execution idempotent.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

401.description: Sync API key or session is missing or invalid

get.description: Lists synchronized cash movements projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized cash movements for a store

get.description: Returns a synchronized cash movement projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

404.description: Store or cash movement not found

get.summary: Get a synchronized cash movement

get.description: Query parameter `since` must be an RFC3339 timestamp. When `MERCADIA_CENTRAL_BACKEND_SYNC_API_KEY` is set, requires `X-Sync-Api-Key` header.

401.description: Sync API key is missing or invalid

get.summary: Get catalog changes since a timestamp

get.description: Lists catalog products for a store. When `MERCADIA_CENTRAL_BACKEND_SYNC_API_KEY` is set, requires `X-Sync-Api-Key` header.

401.description: Sync API key is missing or invalid

get.summary: List catalog products for a store

get.description: Lists synchronized fiscal documents projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized fiscal documents for a store

get.description: Returns a synchronized fiscal document projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

404.description: Store or fiscal document not found

get.summary: Get a synchronized fiscal document

get.description: Lists synchronized closed operational days projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized closed operational days for a store

get.description: Returns a synchronized closed operational day projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

404.description: Store or operational day not found

get.summary: Get a synchronized closed operational day

get.description: Lists synchronized payments projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized payments for a store

get.description: Returns a synchronized payment projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get a synchronized payment

get.description: Query parameters `since` and `until` must be RFC3339 timestamps (inclusive window). Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get store reporting summary for a time window

get.description: Lists synchronized returns projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized returns for a store

get.description: Returns a synchronized return projected from Store Edge events. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.
get.summary: Get a synchronized return

get.description: Lists synchronized Store Edge events accepted for a store. Requires `X-Session-Token` header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: List synchronized Store Edge events

post.description: Accepts synchronized Store Edge event batches over HTTP. When `MERCADIA_CENTRAL_BACKEND_SYNC_API_KEY` is set, requires `X-Sync-Api-Key` header.

parameters.description: Unique key used to make command execution idempotent.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

401.description: Sync API key is missing or invalid
